message.content:
[
  {
    "title": "German Time Use Survey 2012/2013",
    "series": "German Time Use Survey (Zeitbudgeterhebung)",
    "country": "Germany",
    "years": "2012-2013",
    "topics": [
      "Time use",
      "Leisure, tourism and sport",
      "Community, urban and rural life",
      "Employment",
      "Family life and marriage"
    ],
    "summary": "National time-diary study measuring daily activities, unpaid work, leisure, and work patterns among households and individuals in Germany. Useful for analyses of time allocation, gender roles, and work–life balance."
  },
  {
    "title": "German Time Use Survey 2001/2002",
    "series": "German Time Use Survey (Zeitbudgeterhebung)",
    "country": "Germany",
    "years": "2001-2002",
    "topics": [
      "Time use",
      "Leisure, tourism and sport",
      "Community, urban and rural life",
      "Employment",
      "Family life and marriage"
    ],
    "summary": "Earlier national time-diary wave capturing detailed daily activity patterns, enabling trend comparisons in time allocation, leisure, and unpaid work."
  },
  {
    "title": "pairfam – German Family Panel",
    "series": "pairfam",
    "country": "Germany",
    "years": "2008-ongoing",
    "topics": [
      "Family life and marriage",
      "Social behaviour and attitudes",
      "PSYCHOLOGY",
      "Employment"
    ],
    "summary": "Longitudinal panel on partnerships, fertility, parenting, relationship dynamics, and intergenerational ties in Germany, with rich psychological scales and socio-economic indicators."
  },
  {
    "title": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey 2018",
    "series": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey",
    "country": "Germany",
    "years": "2018",
    "topics": [
      "Employment",
      "Vocational education and training",
      "Social behaviour and attitudes",
      "Leisure, tourism and sport"
    ],
    "summary": "Large-scale survey on working conditions, job tasks, qualifications, health and safety, and training participation among employed persons in Germany."
  },
  {
    "title": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey 2012",
    "series": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey",
    "country": "Germany",
    "years": "2012",
    "topics": [
      "Employment",
      "Vocational education and training",
      "Social behaviour and attitudes"
    ],
    "summary": "Wave focusing on employment structure, skills, training, workplace health and safety, and job requirements for the German workforce."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2017 – Work Orientations V (Germany)",
    "series": "ISSP",
    "country": "Germany (national sample within international ISSP)",
    "years": "2017",
    "topics": [
      "Employment",
      "Social behaviour and attitudes",
      "PSYCHOLOGY"
    ],
    "summary": "Module on work values, job quality, workplace relations, and employment preferences, enabling international comparison and German-focused analysis."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2012 – Family and Changing Gender Roles IV (Germany)",
    "series": "ISSP",
    "country": "Germany (national sample within international ISSP)",
    "years": "2012",
    "topics": [
      "Family life and marriage",
      "Social behaviour and attitudes",
      "PSYCHOLOGY",
      "Employment"
    ],
    "summary": "Module examining attitudes toward family, marriage, gender roles, childcare, and employment, suitable for trend and cross-national comparisons."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2016 – Role of Government V (Germany)",
    "series": "ISSP",
    "country": "Germany (national sample within international ISSP)",
    "years": "2016",
    "topics": [
      "Legislation and legal systems",
      "Crime and law enforcement",
      "Community, urban and rural life",
      "Social behaviour and attitudes"
    ],
    "summary": "Module covering views on government responsibilities, law and order, civil liberties, redistribution, public spending (including police and courts), and trust in institutions."
  },
  {
    "title": "ALLBUS 2018 – German General Social Survey",
    "series": "ALLBUS",
    "country": "Germany",
    "years": "2018",
    "topics": [
      "Social behaviour and attitudes",
      "Community, urban and rural life",
      "Leisure, tourism and sport",
      "Employment",
      "Family life and marriage"
    ],
    "summary": "National general social survey with broad coverage of social attitudes, demographics, community attachment, leisure activities, and employment-related indicators."
  },
  {
    "title": "GESIS Panel – Longitudinal Survey of the German Population",
    "series": "GESIS Panel",
    "country": "Germany",
    "years": "2013-ongoing",
    "topics": [
      "Social behaviour and attitudes",
      "PSYCHOLOGY",
      "Leisure, tourism and sport",
      "Community, urban and rural life",
      "Employment"
    ],
    "summary": "Probability-based longitudinal panel collecting repeated measures on attitudes, behavior, psychological traits, and socio-economic status; includes rotating modules relevant to leisure, community, and employment."
  }
]
